description: Библиотека промптов для Kling AI (Umnik.ai). Каждый промпт — атмосферная сцена для генерации видео.

prompts.prompt: Cinematic shot of Mount Elbrus at sunrise, golden light on snow-capped peaks, soft mist in the valley below, slow upward camera tilt, photorealistic, 4K
Cozy wooden chalet in Caucasus mountains at dusk, warm light glowing through windows, snow gently falling, smoke from chimney, peaceful atmosphere, cinematic
Aerial drone shot gliding over Baksan valley, Caucasus mountains on both sides, winding river below, autumn forest colors, golden hour light, smooth movement
Crystal clear alpine lake reflecting mountain peaks, misty morning atmosphere, gentle ripples on the surface, slow zoom in, Prielbrusye, cinematic nature
Skier descending Cheget slope, powder snow, dramatic Caucasus mountain backdrop, slow motion, cinematic winter sports, bright sunny day
Enduro motorcycle riding on mountain trail, Caucasus landscape, dust trail behind bike, epic scenery, action shot, cinematic movement
Milky Way over Caucasus mountains, wooden chalet silhouette in foreground, starry sky time-lapse, mountain peaks, magical night atmosphere
Warm wooden interior of mountain chalet, fireplace crackling, soft candlelight, cozy blanket on sofa, mountain view through window, hygge atmosphere
Majestic waterfall in Caucasus mountain gorge, lush green vegetation, mist spray, slow motion water flow, summer light, cinematic nature film
Autumn forest in Prielbrusye, golden and red leaves, mountain peaks above treeline, warm afternoon light, gentle camera movement through trees
Cable car ascending Elbrus from Azau meadow, mountains below, clouds at eye level, smooth upward movement, epic scale of Caucasus landscape
Steaming thermal spring in mountain gorge, misty hot water, rocky landscape, dramatic atmosphere, cinematic slow motion water flow
